---
title: Barbra and Lisa's Magical Statistics Adventure (working title)
author: Barbra and Lisa
date: today
format: 
  typst: default
  docx: default
  revealjs:
    theme: blood
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    css: styles.css
    smaller: true
    scrollable: true
    incremental: false
    output-file: slides.html
---


```{r}
targets::tar_read(pretty_summary)
```
